case_title: HUGO M. SCHAUER VS. CONARD HOUSE, INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO HUGO SCHAUER RETURNED-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SCHAUER, HUGO M. AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: RICHARD HEASLEY. FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED DEC-03-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUGO M. SCHAUER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONARD HOUSE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVE HASBROCK PROPERTY MANAGER AND PAUL SCHMIDT DIRECTOR OF REAL ESTATE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1590 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-19-2021 IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HUGO M. SCHAUER. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CONRAD HOUSE, INC. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
